title: Raw data supporting metabarcoding unsorted kick-samples research
author: Pereira-da-Conceicoa, Lyndall
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw data supporting: Metabarcoding unsorted kick-samples facilitates macroinvertebrate-based bioassessment with increased taxonomic resolution, while outperforming environmental DNA. 

 Two-step PCRs were performed on each sample replicate using the Qiagen Multiplex PCR Plus Kit. 

 The pool was loaded onto an Illumina MiSeq at 9pM, with 5% Phi-X, using a 600 cycle V3 kit with 300 bp paired end sequencing (index read steps skipped). 
 
Also available in the NCBI SRA:  https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/sra/PRJNA629361
